debug_info.goal:
μ ν : Measure ℝ
inst✝¹ : IsProbabilityMeasure μ
inst✝ : IsProbabilityMeasure ν
n : ℕ
i j : Fin n
h : i ≠ j
⊢ HasLaw (fun ω => wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n)

proof:
by_cases hij : i < j
  · exact offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n hij
  · have hji : j < i := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt hij) (Ne.symm h)
    have hsymm : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω j i) := by
      ext ω
      exact wignerMatrixSymmetric n i j
    rw [hsymm]
    exact offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n hji
successful_attempts:
by_cases hij : i < j
  · exact offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n hij
  · have hji : j < i := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt hij) (Ne.symm h)
    have hsymm : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω j i) := by
      ext ω
      exact wignerMatrixSymmetric n i j
    rw [hsymm]
    exact offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n hji

by_cases hij : i < j
  · exact offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n hij
  · have hji : j < i := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt hij) (Ne.symm h)
    have h_symm : (fun ω => wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = (fun ω => wignerMatrixMap n ω j i) := by
      funext ω
      exact wignerMatrixSymmetric n i j
    rw [h_symm]
    exact offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n hji

by_cases h' : i < j
  · exact offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n h'
  · have h'' : j < i := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt h') (Ne.symm h)
    have hsymm : (fun ω => wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = (fun ω => wignerMatrixMap n ω j i) := by
      ext ω
      exact wignerMatrixSymmetric n i j
    rw [hsymm]
    exact offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n h''

by_cases hij : i < j
  · exact offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n hij
  · have hji : j < i := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt hij) (Ne.symm h)
    have hsym : (fun ω => wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = (fun ω => wignerMatrixMap n ω j i) := by
      ext ω
      exact wignerMatrixSymmetric n i j
    rw [hsym]
    exact offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n hji

cases lt_or_gt_of_ne h with
  | inl h_lt => exact offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n h_lt
  | inr h_gt =>
    have h_symm : ∀ ω, wignerMatrixMap n ω i j = wignerMatrixMap n ω j i := fun ω => wignerMatrixSymmetric n i j
    have h_law : HasLaw (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω j i) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n h_gt
    simp only [HasLaw] at *
    convert h_law using 1
    congr 1
    ext ω
    exact h_symm ω

by_cases h_lt : i < j
  · exact offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n h_lt
  · have h_gt : j < i := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt h_lt) (Ne.symm h)
    have h_eq : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω j i) := by
      ext ω
      exact wignerMatrixSymmetric n i j
    rw [h_eq]
    exact offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n h_gt

by_cases h' : i < j
  · exact offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n h'
  · have h'' : j < i := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt h') (Ne.symm h)
    have hsymm : (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) = (fun ω ↦ wignerMatrixMap n ω j i) := by
      ext ω
      exact wignerMatrixSymmetric n i j
    rw [hsymm]
    exact offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n h''

by_cases hij : i < j

    rw [h_symm]
    exact offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n hji

by_cases hij : i < j

    exact offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n hji

by_cases h_lt : i < j
  · exact offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n h_lt
  · have h_gt : j < i := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt h_lt) (Ne.symm h)
    have h_symm : ∀ ω, wignerMatrixMap n ω i j = wignerMatrixMap n ω j i := fun ω => wignerMatrixSymmetric n i j
    have h_law : HasLaw (fun ω ↦ (wignerMatrixMap n ω) j i) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n) := offDiagonalHasLaw' μ ν n h_gt
    simp_rw [h_symm]
    exact h_law
